description:
Perform a comprehensive audit of the interaction profile for 'Capecitabine' in the Liverpool Cancer iChart app. Count the number of individual drugs listed within every co-medication category and generate a report at '/sdcard/Download/capecitabine_audit.txt' using the following format:

CAPECITABINE INTERACTION AUDIT
==============================
Total number of co-medication categories: [N]

Category breakdown:
- [Category Name]: [count] co-medications
...

Category with most entries: [Category Name] ([count] co-medications)
Total individual co-medications across all categories: [total]

The report must reflect the actual data found within the application.
